query:
INSERT INTO system_settings (`key`, value, type, description) VALUES 
('radius_server_public_ip', '', 'string', 'Public IP address of RADIUS server (for public IP connections)'),
('radius_server_vpn_ip', '10.0.0.1', 'string', 'VPN tunnel IP of RADIUS server (for VPN connections)'),
('vpn_server_address', '', 'string', 'VPN server address for MikroTik to connect to')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description = VALUES(description);
